seoTitle: How to Generate Knowledge Base Articles With Freddy AI
metaDescription: Learn how to use Freddy AI in Freshdesk to draft knowledge base articles faster instead of writing them entirely from scratch.
intro: Writing help articles from scratch takes time, and Freshdesk's Freddy AI can speed that up by generating a first draft for you. This guide covers how to use Freddy AI to create knowledge base content.

steps.heading: Open the knowledge base editor
steps.body: Navigate to the section where you create or edit knowledge base articles in Freshdesk.

steps.heading: Access the Freddy AI option
steps.body: Look for the Freddy AI assistant option available within the article creation flow.

steps.heading: Provide a prompt or topic
steps.body: Give Freddy AI a topic, ticket reference, or brief description of what the article should cover.

steps.heading: Review and refine the draft
steps.body: Read through the AI-generated draft, edit for accuracy and tone, and publish once it meets your standards.

faq.question: Does Freddy AI write the entire article for me?
faq.answer: Freddy AI generates a draft you can use as a starting point, but reviewing and editing for accuracy is still recommended.

faq.question: Can Freddy AI create articles from past tickets?
faq.answer: Freddy AI can often use resolved ticket content as a source to help generate relevant article drafts.

faq.question: Is Freddy AI available on all Freshdesk plans?
faq.answer: AI features like Freddy are typically tied to specific plan tiers or add-ons, so check your plan's availability.

faq.question: Can I edit the article after Freddy AI generates it?
faq.answer: Yes, the generated content is fully editable before you publish it to your knowledge base.
